html:
Exclusive to:

The Limestone Suit is a craftable Armor item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 3 Limestone and 2 Rope to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. When worn it absorbs 70% of physical damage and restores 2 Sanity per minute. However, it reduces walking speed by 10%. It has 825 hit points.

Gallery

  • Wilson wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Willow wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Wolfgang wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Wendy wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • WX-78 wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Wickerbottom wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Woodie wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Wes wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Maxwell wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Wigfrid wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Webber wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Walani wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Warly wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Wilbur wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Woodlegs wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Wilba wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Wormwood wearing a Limestone Suit.
  • Wheeler wearing a Limestone Suit.

"armorlimestone"
“I'm sure this will hold up great!”
–Wilson
“It's so... heavy.”
–Willow
“This mighty armor will protect me!”
–Wolfgang
“Heavy...”
–Wendy
“EXTRA HEAVY DUTY CASING”
–WX-78
“A suit of skeletal fragments from the ocean floor.”
–Wickerbottom
“Makes me feel sorta tough.”
–Woodie
“It renders me... sluggish.”
–Maxwell
“Has considerably more weight when it is worn.”
–Wagstaff
“It's heft is reassuring ön my bönes.”
–Wigfrid
“Our back hurts...”
–Webber
“Seems maybe, like, *too* sturdy.”
–Walani
“With this I will be a stone man.”
–Warly
“This'd sink like a stone on th'sea.”
–Woodlegs
“HEAVY HANGETH THIS ARMOR”
–Wilba
“Heavy”
–Wormwood
“It's heavier than the sandbags on my balloon.”
–Wheeler
The Limestone Suit is a craftable Armor item introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 3 Limestone and 2 Rope to craft, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. When worn it absorbs 70% of physical damage and restores 2 Sanity per minute. However, it reduces walking speed by 10%. It has 825 hit points.

The '''Limestone Suit''' is a craftable [[Armor]] item introduced in the ''[[Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It requires 3 [[Limestone]] and 2 [[Rope]] to craft, and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. When worn it absorbs 70% of physical damage and restores 2 [[Sanity]] per minute. However, it reduces walking [[Player Speed|speed]] by 10%. It has 825 hit points.
